summary: Fixed lesson introduction container width in ExercisesPager component - changed outer container from max-w-3xl (768px) to max-w-7xl (1280px) and inner content from max-w-md (448px) to max-w-2xl (672px)
gotchas: ExercisesPager has 4 page states (intro, about, exercise, outro) - width change only affects intro/about/outro, not exercise state which uses ExerciseWorkspace
Mobile padding was already correct (px-4 = 16px) - only desktop max-width needed fixing
